subject: Welcome. Here is what you signed up for.
preheader: The farms, the food, and what happens next.
body:
Hi {first_name},

You signed up because something about the way we buy food stopped making sense. Maybe it was picking up a pack of chicken and realising you had no idea where it came from. Maybe it was wondering why fresh food never tasted the way you remembered.

You are not alone. That is exactly why FarmThru exists.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Not a meal kit. Not a box you cannot customise. Every product comes from a named regenerative farm in NSW. Rachel's Farm in Kempsey. Bundarra Farm. Farmer Brown. You will always know the farm behind your food.

You order online. Your food goes from the farm to our Brookvale hub. You collect it days later, not weeks. Zero middlemen. No commitment.

Here is what is coming next. Over the next few emails, we will introduce you to the farms, the food, and the team. We will also share details about our equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal, launching mid-2026. No fluff. Just what you need to decide if this is something you want to be part of.

If you are in Sydney, the Brookvale hub is open Monday to Friday. You do not have to wait for the campaign to try the food.

This is not financial advice. The disclosure document will be available on Birchal.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
creative_brief: Clean welcome email. FarmThru logo header. Single CTA button linking to the shop. Brief, warm, expectation-setting. Simple product hero shot below the logo. No clutter.
primary_text: You signed up because something about the way we buy food stopped making sense.
headline: Welcome. Here is what you signed up for.
